sourcePolicy.notes: Coordinates are stored as WGS84 [lng, lat] for ECharts geo/map rendering. Do not replace this file with BD-09 or GCJ-02 coordinates unless they are converted back to WGS84 first.

theatres.name: 国家大剧院
theatres.address: 北京市西城区西长安街2号
theatres.intro: 国家级综合表演艺术中心，涵盖歌剧、音乐会、话剧、舞蹈等大型演出。
theatres.source: WGS84 seed, verify with compliant coordinate source before production.
